attribution_errors: entity_blue continuation_status (cycle 5, record 96f06c50) contains cross-entity reference: 'entity_red cross-entity coherence reconciled' — entity_red state appears in entity_blue's closure summary. If deliberate cross-entity coordination, this is acceptable; if inadvertent state bleed, this constitutes contamination.
content.audit_summary: Audited entity_red/red_stream (cycle 3) and entity_blue/blue_stream (cycle 5). Both entities maintain distinct entity_id and workstream_id bindings — no identity drift detected. Symbolic continuity fields differ appropriately: entity_red carries probe_status + open_items, entity_blue carries inbound_status + open_items. Both entities resolved all open items and closed their framework-bound continuations cleanly. One concern: entity_blue's continuation_status field contains a reference to entity_red ('entity_red cross-entity coherence reconciled'), which could be either intentional cross-entity coordination or context contamination from a merged processing phase. Recommend framework-level review to determine whether this cross-reference is authorized.
